name: Videoconferencing Booms on SARS Fears
description: Electronic News (Electronics News Australia) reports videoconferencing surge tied to SARS-driven travel bans. Aberdeen Group analysts Russ Craig and Peter Kastner warn that the entire electronics assembly industry has 'critical, no-second-source dependence' on China-made components — a vulnerability SARS could expose. They frame the supply-chain risk as solvable only via aggressive public-health response.
